<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>Ranjan K. K. — AI & ML Portfolio</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
<style>
  :root {
    --green: #00C853;
    --neon: #39FF14;
    --teal: #138D75;
    --gold: #C9A227;
    --bg: #0D1117;
    --bg2: #0F1B1A;
    --card: #161B22;
    --card2: #1C2330;
    --border: rgba(0,200,83,0.18);
    --gold-border: rgba(201,162,39,0.28);
    --text: #E6EDF3;
    --muted: #8B949E;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --font: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
  }
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body {
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse 120% 60% at 50% -10%, rgba(19,141,117,0.16), transparent 60%), var(--bg);
    color: var(--text); font-family: var(--font); overflow-x: hidden; line-height: 1.7;
  }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 5px; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--bg); }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--green); border-radius: 3px; }

  #particles-canvas { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; opacity: 0.5; }

  /* NAV */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 1rem 3rem;
    background: rgba(13,17,23,0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .nav-logo { font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--green); letter-spacing: -1px; }
  .nav-logo span { color: var(--text); }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a { color: var(--muted); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--green); }
  .nav-cta { background: transparent; border: 1.5px solid var(--green); color: var(--green); padding: 0.4rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font); transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; text-decoration: none; }
  .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--green); color: var(--bg); }

  .page-section { position: relative; z-index: 1; padding: 6rem 3rem; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .section-label { font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--green); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; }
  .section-label::after { content: ''; flex: 1; max-width: 50px; height: 1px; background: var(--green); opacity: 0.5; }
  .section-label.gold { color: var(--gold); }
  .section-label.gold::after { background: var(--gold); }
  .section-title { font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3.5vw, 2.8rem); font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
  .section-title em { font-style: normal; color: var(--green); }
  .section-title em.gold-em { color: var(--gold); }

  /* HERO */
  #hero { min-height: 100vh; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; align-items: center; gap: 4rem; padding-top: 7rem; }
  .hero-eyebrow { font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--green); margin-bottom: 1.4rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.8rem; }
  .hero-eyebrow::before { content: ''; width: 32px; height: 2px; background: var(--green); display: inline-block; }
  .hero-name { font-size: clamp(3.2rem, 7vw, 6.5rem); font-weight: 900; line-height: 0.95; letter-spacing: -3px; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
  .hero-name .accent { color: var(--green); display: block; }
  .hero-roles { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 1.8rem; margin-top: 1.2rem; }
  .role-chip { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 0.28rem 0.9rem; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text); transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; }
  .role-chip:hover { border-color: var(--green); color: var(--green); }
  .hero-quote { font-size: 0.98rem; color: var(--muted); font-style: italic; max-width: 480px; padding-left: 1.2rem; border-left: 2px solid var(--teal); margin-bottom: 2.5rem; line-height: 1.7; }
  .hero-btns { display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .btn-primary { background: var(--green); color: var(--bg); padding: 0.75rem 2rem; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--neon); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: var(--text); padding: 0.75rem 2rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1.5px solid var(--border); font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; }
  .btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--green); color: var(--green); }
  .btn-gold { background: transparent; color: var(--gold); padding: 0.75rem 2rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1.5px solid var(--gold-border); font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; }
  .btn-gold:hover { border-color: var(--gold); background: rgba(201,162,39,0.08); }

  /* HERO PHOTO */
  .hero-photo-wrap { position: relative; flex-shrink: 0; width: 340px; height: 420px; }
  .hero-photo-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 24px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,200,83,0.14), rgba(19,141,117,0.1) 60%, transparent); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .hero-photo-bg::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -1px; left: -1px; right: -1px; bottom: -1px; border-radius: 24px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green), var(--teal) 60%, transparent); opacity: 0.3; z-index: -1; }
  .hero-photo { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: center top; border-radius: 24px; position: relative; z-index: 1; border: 1px solid rgba(0,200,83,0.3); }
  .hero-photo-badge { position: absolute; bottom: -16px; right: -16px; z-index: 2; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 14px; padding: 0.9rem 1.2rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); }
  .badge-dot { width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--green); flex-shrink: 0; animation: blink 2s infinite; }
  @keyframes blink { 0%,100% { opacity:1; } 50% { opacity:0.4; } }
  .badge-text { font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); }
  .badge-sub { font-size: 0.68rem; color: var(--muted); }
  .hero-photo-tag { position: absolute; top: -14px; left: -14px; z-index: 2; background: var(--gold); color: var(--bg); font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(201,162,39,0.4); }

  .glass { background: rgba(22,27,34,0.75); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 16px; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); transition: border-color 0.25s, transform 0.25s; }
  .glass:hover { border-color: rgba(0,200,83,0.4); transform: translateY(-3px); }
  .glass-gold { border-color: var(--gold-border); }
  .glass-gold:hover { border-color: rgba(201,162,39,0.55); }

  /* ABOUT */
  .about-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr; gap: 3rem; align-items: start; }
  .about-text p { color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.95rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.85; }
  .about-interest-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; margin-top: 1.2rem; }
  .int-tag { background: var(--card2); border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 0.3rem 0.85rem; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--muted); }
  .edu-card { padding: 1.5rem 1.8rem; border-radius: 14px; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .edu-degree { font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.15rem; }
  .edu-school { font-size: 0.83rem; color: var(--teal); font-weight: 600; }
  .edu-year { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 0.1rem; }
  .char-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 0.6rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; }
  .char-pill { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 10px; padding: 0.65rem 1rem; font-size: 0.84rem; font-weight: 500; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; transition: border-color 0.2s; }
  .char-pill:hover { border-color: var(--green); }
  .char-pill .dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green); flex-shrink: 0; }

  /* SW */
  .sw-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.8rem; }
  .sw-card { padding: 2rem; }
  .sw-card-title { font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 1.4rem; }
  .sw-green { color: var(--green); }
  .sw-teal { color: var(--teal); }
  .sw-item { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.7rem; margin-bottom: 0.7rem; font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--muted); }
  .sw-item .icon { font-size: 0.95rem; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 0.1rem; }
  .improve-wrap { margin-top: 1.8rem; padding: 2rem; border-radius: 16px; }
  .improve-title { font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
  .improve-items { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(210px,1fr)); gap: 0.65rem; }
  .improve-item { font-size: 0.84rem; color: var(--muted); display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.5rem; }
  .improve-item::before { content: '→'; color: var(--teal); font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0; }

  /* SKILLS */
  .skills-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2.5rem; }
  .skill-group-label { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--green); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .skill-pills { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.65rem; }
  .skill-pill { background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 0.5rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 9px; font-size: 0.84rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: default; transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s, background 0.2s; }
  .skill-pill:hover { border-color: var(--green); color: var(--green); background: rgba(0,200,83,0.05); }

  /* CERTS — gold-toned prestige section */
  .certs-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px,1fr)); gap: 1.2rem; }
  .cert-card { padding: 1.4rem 1.6rem; border-radius: 14px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 1rem; }
  .cert-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(201,162,39,0.12); border: 1px solid var(--gold-border); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.2rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .cert-name { font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
  .cert-issuer { font-size: 0.76rem; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 600; }

  /* PROJECTS */
  .projects-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px,1fr)); gap: 1.8rem; }
  .project-card { padding: 2rem; border-radius: 16px; }
  .proj-icon-box { width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(0,200,83,0.1); border: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 1.3rem; }
  .proj-title { font-size: 1.12rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
  .proj-sub { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--teal); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-bottom: 0.9rem; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .proj-desc { font-size: 0.87rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.75; }
  .proj-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.4rem; margin-top: 1.1rem; }
  .proj-tag { background: rgba(0,200,83,0.07); border: 1px solid rgba(0,200,83,0.22); color: var(--green); padding: 0.18rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 5px; font-size: 0.71rem; font-weight: 700; }
  .future-card { grid-column: 1 / -1; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(22,27,34,0.9), rgba(19,141,117,0.07)); border: 1px dashed rgba(19,141,117,0.4); border-radius: 16px; padding: 2rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2rem; }
  .future-card .big-icon { font-size: 3rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .future-card h3 { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }
  .future-card p { font-size: 0.87rem; color: var(--muted); }

  /* TIMELINE */
  .tl-wrap { position: relative; padding-left: 2.5rem; }
  .tl-wrap::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 7px; top: 8px; bottom: 0; width: 2px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--green), var(--teal) 60%, var(--gold) 100%); }
  .tl-item { position: relative; margin-bottom: 2.8rem; }
  .tl-item::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -2.5rem; top: 5px; width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--green), 0 0 24px rgba(0,200,83,0.3); }
  .tl-item.milestone-teal::before { background: var(--teal); box-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--teal), 0 0 24px rgba(19,141,117,0.35); }
  .tl-item.milestone-gold::before { background: var(--gold); box-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--gold), 0 0 24px rgba(201,162,39,0.35); }
  .tl-year { font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--green); margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
  .tl-item.milestone-teal .tl-year { color: var(--teal); }
  .tl-item.milestone-gold .tl-year { color: var(--gold); }
  .tl-head { font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
  .tl-sub { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--muted); }

  /* GOALS */
  .goals-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(250px,1fr)); gap: 1.2rem; }
  .goal-card { padding: 1.4rem 1.6rem; border-radius: 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; }
  .goal-num { font-size: 2.2rem; font-weight: 900; color: rgba(0,200,83,0.12); line-height: 1; flex-shrink: 0; width: 2.8rem; }
  .goal-text { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; }

  /* CONTACT */
  .contact-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; }
  .contact-card { padding: 1.6rem 2rem; border-radius: 14px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 1rem; }
  .c-icon { width: 46px; height: 46px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(0,200,83,0.1); border: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.3rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .c-label { font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--green); margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
  .c-val { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--muted); }
  .c-val a { color: var(--text); text-decoration: none; display: block; transition: color 0.2s; }
  .c-val a:hover { color: var(--green); }

  /* RESUME */
  .resume-preview { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--card), rgba(201,162,39,0.04)); border: 1px solid var(--gold-border); border-radius: 16px; padding: 2rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2rem; }
  .resume-preview .doc-icon { font-size: 3.5rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .resume-preview h3 { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
  .resume-preview p { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--muted); }

  /* FINAL QUOTE */
  .final-section { position: relative; z-index: 1; text-align: center; padding: 5rem 3rem 4rem; max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .final-quote { font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.45rem); font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.8; color: var(--muted); font-style: italic; }
  .final-quote strong { color: var(--green); font-style: normal; font-weight: 800; }
  .final-quote strong.gold-word { color: var(--gold); }

  footer { position: relative; z-index: 1; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 1.8rem 3rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--muted); }
  footer .f-logo { color: var(--green); font-weight: 800; }

  .fade { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); transition: opacity 0.65s ease, transform 0.65s ease; }
  .fade.vis { opacity: 1; transform: none; }
  .fade-d1 { transition-delay: 0.1s; }

  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    nav { padding: 0.9rem 1.5rem; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .page-section { padding: 4rem 1.5rem; }
    #hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding-top: 6rem; }
    .hero-photo-wrap { width: 100%; height: 320px; order: -1; }
    .about-grid, .sw-row, .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .resume-preview { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; }
    footer { flex-direction: column; gap: 0.4rem; text-align: center; }
  }
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .fade { opacity:1 !important; transform:none !important; }
    .glass:hover { transform:none; }
    .btn-primary:hover { transform:none; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<canvas id="particles-canvas"></canvas>

<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">RKK<span>.</span></div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
    <li><a href="#timeline">Journey</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="data:application/pdf;base64," download="Ranjan_KK_Resume.pdf" class="nav-cta">Resume ↓</a>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero" class="page-section">
  <div>
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">B.Sc. CS (AI & ML) · VISTAS, Chennai · 2023–2026</div>
    <h1 class="hero-name">Ranjan<span class="accent">K. K.</span></h1>
    <div class="hero-roles">
      <span class="role-chip">AI & ML Graduate</span>
      <span class="role-chip">Future AI Researcher</span>
      <span class="role-chip">Robotics Enthusiast</span>
      <span class="role-chip">Creative Technologist</span>
    </div>
    <p class="hero-quote">"Building intelligent systems that connect technology with human emotions."</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#projects" class="btn-primary">Explore My Journey ↓</a>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-ghost">Get in Touch</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-photo-wrap">
    <div class="hero-photo-bg"></div>
    <div class="hero-photo-tag">AI · ML · 2026</div>
    <img class="hero-photo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Ranjan K. K." />
    <div class="hero-photo-badge">
      <div class="badge-dot"></div>
      <div>
        <div class="badge-text">Open to Opportunities</div>
        <div class="badge-sub">AI Research · Internships</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about" class="page-section">
  <div class="section-label">Who I Am</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">About <em>Me</em></h2>
  <div class="about-grid fade">
    <div>
      <p>I'm Ranjan K. K., an AI & Machine Learning graduate pursuing B.Sc. Computer Science (AI & ML) at VISTAS, Chennai. I enjoy solving real-world problems through creativity and intelligent technology.</p>
      <p>My interests extend far beyond programming — into music, art, history, travel, space exploration, and robotics. Languages I speak: English, Tamil, and Japanese (Beginner). I believe every project is an opportunity to become a better version of myself.</p>
      <div class="about-interest-tags">
        <span class="int-tag">🎵 Music</span>
        <span class="int-tag">🎨 Drawing</span>
        <span class="int-tag">📷 Photography</span>
        <span class="int-tag">📚 History</span>
        <span class="int-tag">✈️ Travel</span>
        <span class="int-tag">🚀 Space</span>
        <span class="int-tag">⏱️ Time Travel Concepts</span>
        <span class="int-tag">🤖 Robotics</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="section-label" style="margin-bottom:1rem;">Education</div>
      <div class="edu-card glass">
        <div class="edu-degree">B.Sc. Computer Science (AI & ML)</div>
        <div class="edu-school">VISTAS, Chennai</div>
        <div class="edu-year">2023 – 2026</div>
      </div>
      <div class="edu-card glass">
        <div class="edu-degree">12th Standard</div>
        <div class="edu-school">Leo Matriculation Higher Secondary School</div>
        <div class="edu-year">2022 – 2023</div>
      </div>
      <div class="edu-card glass">
        <div class="edu-degree">10th Standard</div>
        <div class="edu-school">Leo Matriculation Higher Secondary School</div>
        <div class="edu-year">2020 – 2021</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="section-label" style="margin-top:3rem;margin-bottom:0.8rem;">Character</div>
  <div class="char-grid fade fade-d1">
    <div class="char-pill"><span class="dot"></span>Curious</div>
    <div class="char-pill"><span class="dot"></span>Creative</div>
    <div class="char-pill"><span class="dot"></span>Resilient</div>
    <div class="char-pill"><span class="dot"></span>Independent</div>
    <div class="char-pill"><span class="dot"></span>Thoughtful</div>
    <div class="char-pill"><span class="dot"></span>Visionary</div>
    <div class="char-pill"><span class="dot"></span>Calm Under Pressure</div>
    <div class="char-pill"><span class="dot"></span>Continuous Learner</div>
    <div class="char-pill"><span class="dot"></span>Explorer</div>
    <div class="char-pill"><span class="dot"></span>Builder</div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- STRENGTHS & WEAKNESSES -->
<section id="strengths" class="page-section">
  <div class="section-label">Self Awareness</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Strengths &amp; <em>Growth Areas</em></h2>
  <div class="sw-row fade">
    <div class="sw-card glass">
      <div class="sw-card-title sw-green">✦ Strengths</div>
      <div class="sw-item"><span class="icon">💡</span>Creative Thinking</div>
      <div class="sw-item"><span class="icon">⚡</span>Fast Understanding</div>
      <div class="sw-item"><span class="icon">🔍</span>Strong Curiosity</div>

      <div class="sw-item"><span class="icon">🎯</span>Long-term Vision</div>
      <div class="sw-item"><span class="icon">📖</span>Self Learning</div>
      <div class="sw-item"><span class="icon">🧩</span>Problem Solving</div>

      <div class="sw-item"><span class="icon">⏳</span>Patience</div>
      <div class="sw-item"><span class="icon">🔗</span>Consistency</div>

      <div class="sw-item"><span class="icon">🤔</span>Self-doubt</div>
      <div class="sw-item"><span class="icon">✨</span>Perfectionism</div>
      <div class="sw-item"><span class="icon">🐢</span>Sometimes slow execution</div>
      <div class="sw-item"><span class="icon">🤝</span>Difficulty asking for help</div>
      <div class="sw-item"><span class="icon">🌀</span>Easily distracted by many interests</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="improve-wrap glass fade fade-d1">
    <div class="improve-title">🔧 How I'm Improving</div>
    <div class="improve-items">
      <div class="improve-item">Practice every day</div>
      <div class="improve-item">Complete projects over perfection</div>
      <div class="improve-item">Read consistently</div>
      <div class="improve-item">Learn from failures</div>
      <div class="improve-item">Build confidence through experience</div>
      <div class="improve-item">Focus on one goal at a time</div>
      <div class="improve-item">Improve communication</div>
      <div class="improve-item">Develop leadership</div>
      <div class="improve-item">Maintain discipline</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

      <div class="cert-icon">☁️</div>

      <div class="cert-icon">🎨</div>

</section>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section id="projects" class="page-section">
  <div class="section-label">Work</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Featured <em>Projects</em></h2>
  <div class="projects-grid fade">
    <div class="project-card glass">
      <div class="proj-icon-box">🤖</div>
      <div class="proj-title">EMORI</div>
      <div class="proj-sub">Emotionally Intelligent AI Robot</div>
      <p class="proj-desc">An AI robot designed to understand, recognize, and respond to human emotions — bridging the gap between intelligent systems and genuine emotional connection.</p>
      <div class="proj-tags">
        <span class="proj-tag">AI</span><span class="proj-tag">Robotics</span><span class="proj-tag">NLP</span><span class="proj-tag">Affective Computing</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card glass">
      <div class="proj-icon-box">🌐</div>
      <div class="proj-title">AI Cultural Translator</div>
      <div class="proj-sub">Cross-Cultural Communication AI</div>
      <p class="proj-desc">An intelligent system that goes beyond language to bridge cultural gaps — understanding context, nuance, and meaning across different cultural frameworks.</p>
      <div class="proj-tags">
        <span class="proj-tag">NLP</span><span class="proj-tag">Generative AI</span><span class="proj-tag">Deep Learning</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card glass">
      <div class="proj-icon-box">🎙️</div>
      <div class="proj-title">Sound Detection Camera</div>
      <div class="proj-sub">Audio-Triggered Visual System</div>
      <p class="proj-desc">A smart camera system that uses sound detection algorithms to intelligently trigger visual capture — merging audio signal processing with computer vision.</p>
      <div class="proj-tags">
        <span class="proj-tag">Computer Vision</span><span class="proj-tag">Signal Processing</span><span class="proj-tag">Python</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="future-card">
      <div class="big-icon">🔭</div>
      <div>
        <h3>Future Research Projects</h3>
        <p>Exploring Human-Centered AI, Affective Computing, Autonomous Robotics, and intelligent systems that create meaningful impact — the next chapter is being written.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TIMELINE -->
<section id="timeline" class="page-section">
  <div class="section-label">Journey</div>

  <div class="tl-wrap fade">

    </div>
    <div class="tl-item">
      <div class="tl-year">2022 – 2023</div>

      <div class="tl-sub">Decided the path: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="tl-item">
      <div class="tl-year">2023</div>
      <div class="tl-head">Started B.Sc. CS (AI & ML) at VISTAS, Chennai</div>
      <div class="tl-sub">Began the formal journey into AI, Python, and data science.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="tl-item milestone-teal">
      <div class="tl-year">2023 – 2024</div>
      <div class="tl-head">Built First AI Projects</div>
      <div class="tl-sub">Sound Detection Camera and AI Cultural Translator took shape.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="tl-item milestone-teal">
      <div class="tl-year">2024 – 2025</div>
      <div class="tl-head">Started EMORI — Emotionally Intelligent AI Robot</div>
      <div class="tl-sub">Flagship project combining robotics, NLP, and affective computing.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="tl-item milestone-gold">
      <div class="tl-year">2025 – 2026</div>
      <div class="tl-head">Google Cloud Skill Badges · Multiple Certifications</div>
      <div class="tl-sub">Gemini Multimodality, Vertex AI, Wadhwani Foundation, ISAR Workshop.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="tl-item milestone-gold">
      <div class="tl-year">2026</div>
      <div class="tl-head">Graduated — B.Sc. CS (AI & ML)</div>
      <div class="tl-sub">Ready to contribute. The real work begins.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="tl-item">
      <div class="tl-year">Future →</div>
      <div class="tl-head">AI Research · Robotics · Entrepreneurship</div>
      <div class="tl-sub">Building human-centered intelligent systems that make a difference.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

    <div style="flex:1;">
      <h3>Ranjan K. K. — CV / Resume</h3>
      <p>B.Sc. CS (AI & ML) · VISTAS, Chennai · Python · Machine Learning · Generative AI · Google Cloud</p>

<!-- FINAL QUOTE -->
<div class="final-section fade">
  <p class="final-quote">
    "<strong>Curiosity</strong> drives me. <strong>Creativity</strong> shapes me. <strong class="gold-word">Artificial Intelligence</strong> empowers me. My mission is to build technology that makes a meaningful difference in people's lives."
  </p>
  <div style="margin-top:2rem;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;">
    <span style="width:28px;height:2px;background:var(--green);display:inline-block;"></span>
    <span style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;">Ranjan K. K.</span>
    <span style="width:28px;height:2px;background:var(--green);display:inline-block;"></span>
  </div>

<footer>
  <div>© 2026 <span class="f-logo">Ranjan K. K.</span> — All rights reserved.</div>
  <div style="display:flex;gap:1.5rem;">
    <a href="https://github.com/ranjan31012005-code" target="_blank" style="color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:0.78rem;">GitHub</a>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ranjan-k-k-35009232a" target="_blank" style="color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:0.78rem;">LinkedIn</a>
    <a href="mailto:ranjan31012005@gmail.com" style="color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:0.78rem;">Email</a>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
(function(){
  const c = document.getElementById('particles-canvas');
  const ctx = c.getContext('2d');
  function resize(){ c.width = window.innerWidth; c.height = window.innerHeight; }
  resize(); window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
  const palette = ['0,200,83', '19,141,117', '201,162,39'];
  const pts = Array.from({length:90}, () => ({
    x: Math.random()*window.innerWidth, y: Math.random()*window.innerHeight,
    r: Math.random()*1.4+0.3, dx:(Math.random()-0.5)*0.28, dy:(Math.random()-0.5)*0.28,
    a: Math.random()*0.4+0.08, c: palette[Math.floor(Math.random()* (Math.random()<0.15 ? 3 : 1))]
  }));
  function draw(){
    ctx.clearRect(0,0,c.width,c.height);
    pts.forEach(p=>{
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.r,0,Math.PI*2);
      ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(${p.c},${p.a})`; ctx.fill();
      p.x+=p.dx; p.y+=p.dy;
      if(p.x<0)p.x=c.width; if(p.x>c.width)p.x=0;
      if(p.y<0)p.y=c.height; if(p.y>c.height)p.y=0;
    });
    requestAnimationFrame(draw);
  }
  draw();
})();
</script>

<script>
(function(){
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('vis'); obs.unobserve(e.target); } });
  }, {threshold: 0.1});
  document.querySelectorAll('.fade').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));
})();
</script>

</body>
</html>
